positive: Minimalist, stylized vector illustration of a mountain range at sunset, rendered in negative space and bold color blocking. The foreground features a single, stylized pine tree and a flowing river silhouette. Composition is symmetrical and centralized, ideal for a repeating print pattern. Use a limited, vibrant palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and crisp cream. Clean, sharp lines, high contrast, solid shapes, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, noisy, grainy, blur, text, watermark, logo, excessive detail, low contrast, fuzzy lines, bad anatomy
